en: "Truly, truly, I say to you, he who does not enter the sheepfold by the door but climbs in by another way, that man is a thief and a robber.
zh: “我實實在在告訴你們，那不從門進羊圈，倒從別處爬進去的，那人就是賊，就是強盜；

en: But he who enters by the door is the shepherd of the sheep.
zh: 那從門進去的，才是羊的牧人。

en: To him the gatekeeper opens. The sheep hear his voice, and he calls his own sheep by name and leads them out.
zh: 看門的給他開門，羊也聽他的聲音；他按著名字呼叫自己的羊，領牠們出來。

en: When he has brought out all his own, he goes before them, and the sheep follow him, for they know his voice.
zh: 他把自己的羊領出來以後，就走在前頭，羊也跟隨他，因為認得他的聲音。

en: A stranger they will not follow, but they will flee from him, for they do not know the voice of strangers."
zh: 牠們決不會跟隨陌生人，反而逃避他，因為不認得陌生人的聲音。”

en: This figure of speech Jesus used with them, but they did not understand what he was saying to them.
zh: 耶穌對他們說了這個譬喻，他們卻不明白他所說的是甚麼。

en: So Jesus again said to them, "Truly, truly, I say to you, I am the door of the sheep.
zh: 於是耶穌又說：“我實實在在告訴你們，我就是羊的門。

en: All who came before me are thieves and robbers, but the sheep did not listen to them.
zh: 所有在我以先來的，都是賊和強盜；羊卻不聽從他們。

en: I am the door. If anyone enters by me, he will be saved and will go in and out and find pasture.
zh: 我就是門，如果有人藉著我進來，就必定得救，並且可以出、可以入，也可以找到草場。

en: The thief comes only to steal and kill and destroy. I came that they may have life and have it abundantly.
zh: 賊來了，不過是要偷竊、殺害、毀壞；我來了，是要使羊得生命，並且得的更豐盛。

en: I am the good shepherd. The good shepherd lays down his life for the sheep.
zh: 我是好牧人，好牧人為羊捨命。

en: He who is a hired hand and not a shepherd, who does not own the sheep, sees the wolf coming and leaves the sheep and flees, and the wolf snatches them and scatters them.
zh: 那作雇工不是牧人的，羊也不是自己的，他一見狼來，就把羊撇下逃跑，狼就抓住羊群，把他們驅散了；

en: He flees because he is a hired hand and cares nothing for the sheep.
zh: 因為他是個雇工，對羊群漠不關心。

en: I am the good shepherd. I know my own and my own know me,
zh: 我是好牧人，我認識我的羊，我的羊也認識我，

en: just as the Father knows me and I know the Father; and I lay down my life for the sheep.
zh: 好像父認識我，我也認識父一樣；並且我為羊捨命。

en: And I have other sheep that are not of this fold. I must bring them also, and they will listen to my voice. So there will be one flock, one shepherd.
zh: 我還有別的羊，不在這羊圈裡；我必須把牠們領來，牠們也要聽我的聲音，並且要合成一群，歸於一個牧人。

en: For this reason the Father loves me, because I lay down my life that I may take it up again.
zh: 父愛我，因為我把生命捨去，好再把它取回來。

en: No one takes it from me, but I lay it down of my own accord. I have authority to lay it down, and I have authority to take it up again. This charge I have received from my Father."
zh: 沒有人能奪去我的生命，是我自己捨去的。我有權把生命捨去，也有權把它取回來；這是我從我的父所領受的命令。”

en: There was again a division among the Jews because of these words.
zh: 猶太人因著這些話又起了紛爭。

en: Many of them said, "He has a demon, and is insane; why listen to him?"
zh: 他們當中有許多人說：“他是鬼附的，他發瘋了；為甚麼要聽他呢？”

en: Others said, "These are not the words of one who is oppressed by a demon. Can a demon open the eyes of the blind?"
zh: 另外有人說：“這話不是鬼附的人所說的。鬼怎能使瞎子的眼睛開了呢？”

en: At that time the Feast of Dedication took place at Jerusalem. It was winter,
zh: 在耶路撒冷，獻殿節到了，那時是冬天。

en: and Jesus was walking in the temple, in the colonnade of Solomon.
zh: 耶穌在殿的所羅門廊上走過，

en: So the Jews gathered around him and said to him, "How long will you keep us in suspense? If you are the Christ, tell us plainly."
zh: 猶太人圍著他，對他說：“你使我們心裡懸疑不定，要到幾時呢？如果你是基督，就公開地告訴我們吧！”

en: Jesus answered them, "I told you, and you do not believe. The works that I do in my Father's name bear witness about me,
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“我已經告訴你們，你們卻不相信；我奉我父的名所作的事，可以為我作證。

en: but you do not believe because you are not part of my flock.
zh: 只是你們不信，因為你們不是我的羊。

en: My sheep hear my voice, and I know them, and they follow me.
zh: 我的羊聽我的聲音，我也認識他們，他們也跟隨我。

en: I give them eternal life, and they will never perish, and no one will snatch them out of my hand.
zh: 我賜給他們永生，他們永不滅亡，誰也不能把他們從我手裡奪去。

en: My Father, who has given them to me, is greater than all, and no one is able to snatch them out of the Father's hand.
zh: 那位把羊群賜給我的父比一切都大，也沒有人能把他們從我父的手裡奪去。

en: I and the Father are one."
zh: 我與父原為一。”

en: The Jews picked up stones again to stone him.
zh: 猶太人又拿起石頭要打他。

en: Jesus answered them, "I have shown you many good works from the Father; for which of them are you going to stone me?"
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“我把許多從父那裡來的善事顯給你們看，你們因哪一件要用石頭打我呢？”

en: The Jews answered him, "It is not for a good work that we are going to stone you but for blasphemy, because you, being a man, make yourself God."
zh: 猶太人對他說：“我們不是因為善事用石頭打你，而是因為你說了僭妄的話；又因為你是個人，竟然把自己當作 神。”

en: Jesus answered them, "Is it not written in your Law, 'I said, you are gods'?
zh: 耶穌說：“你們的律法上不是寫著‘我說你們是神’嗎？

en: If he called them gods to whom the word of God came- and Scripture cannot be broken-
zh: 聖經是不能廢除的，如果那些承受 神的道的人， 神尚且稱他們是神，

en: do you say of him whom the Father consecrated and sent into the world, 'You are blaspheming,' because I said, 'I am the Son of God'?
zh: 那麼父所分別為聖又差到世上來的，他自稱是 神的兒子，你們就說他說了僭妄 神的話嗎？

en: If I am not doing the works of my Father, then do not believe me;
zh: 我若不作我父的事，你們就不必信我；

en: but if I do them, even though you do not believe me, believe the works, that you may know and understand that the Father is in me and I am in the Father."
zh: 我若作了，你們縱然不信我，也應當信這些事，好使你們確實知道，我父是在我裡面，我也在父裡面。”

en: Again they sought to arrest him, but he escaped from their hands.
zh: 他們又要逮捕耶穌，他卻從他們的手中逃脫了。

en: He went away again across the Jordan to the place where John had been baptizing at first, and there he remained.
zh: 耶穌又往約旦河東去，到約翰從前施洗的地方，住在那裡。

en: And many came to him. And they said, "John did no sign, but everything that John said about this man was true."
zh: 許多人到他那裡去，說：“約翰沒有行過一件神蹟，但約翰指著這人所說的一切話，都是真實的。”

en: And many believed in him there.
zh: 在那裡就有許多人信了耶穌。
